## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to spec document(s) (e.g. `PRD.md` §7.2, `milestone1.md` M1-BE-01)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met (list ID(s), e.g. AC1, BE-STD5)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated (if this changes behavior described elsewhere)
